items.title: Model promotion workflows
items.description: Register validated runs as versioned models and move them through Staging to Production with audit trails tied to experiment IDs.

items.title: Hyperparameter search organization
items.description: Tag sweep runs by search family and compare top candidates on validation metrics before registering the winner.

items.title: Incident response and rollback
items.description: When production quality drops, use registry version and source run ID to identify the prior good version and roll back with known lineage.

items.title: Collaborative ML teams
items.description: Shared experiment IDs and tags let teammates reproduce, review, and compare runs without copying ad hoc notebook outputs.
